summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 fixes: (1) Icon picker color swatches with inline styles, (2) Category dropdown re-fetch on dialog open, (3) ProductHero hardcoded outcome strip removal, (4) ProductDetail legacy sections removal + ReactMarkdown rendering. All 12 backend tests and all 12 UI feature checks passed. Migration verified: 21+ products have custom_sections.

issues: ResizeObserver loop completed with undelivered notifications - benign browser error from Radix UI, no functional impact

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: ResizeObserver loop error visible in admin dialog - from Radix UI components, not app code. No action needed.
SectionsEditor: uses SPA state (useState expandedIdx) - works well, first section auto-expands when opening existing product
ProductForm.tsx: category uses Shadcn Select (not native select), data-testid='pf-category' is on SelectTrigger button - works correctly
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing prod_zoho_crm_express (migrated product).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 fixes tested and verified: (1) Icon swatches: 6 swatches with inline background-color styles (blue=#3b82f6, green=#22c55e, red=#ef4444, purple=#a855f7, orange=#f97316, slate=#64748b). (2) Category dropdown: useEffect in ProductsTab.tsx re-fetches on showDialog=true, shows 7 categories. (3) ProductHero: no hardcoded outcome strip, shows description_long from product data. (4) ProductDetail: uses ReactMarkdown, renders `- bullets` as `<ul><li>` HTML, `1. steps` as `<ol><li>` HTML, no legacy static sections. Migration ran: prod_zoho_crm_express has 4 sections (What's Included/CheckCircle/green, Not Included/XCircle/red, What We Need From You/Users/orange, Next Steps/Rocket/blue). FAQs still render.
rca_of_issues: No issues found. All 4 fixes confirmed working: (1) Tailwind purge issue fixed via inline styles for icon color swatches in SectionsEditor.tsx and SectionCard.tsx. (2) Category stale data fixed via useEffect on showDialog in ProductsTab.tsx. (3) ProductHero.tsx cleaned of hardcoded outcomeCopy function and 3-col strip. (4) ProductDetail.tsx uses ReactMarkdown with prose styling, legacy fallback sections removed.
